import io
import string
import list

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  if list.contains(xs, v)
    xs
  else
    let n = xs.len()
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    mut inserted = false
    while i < n
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(x)
        if not inserted and v < x
          result = list.push(result, v)
          inserted = true
        end
        result = list.push(result, x)
      when None
        ()
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    if not inserted
      result = list.push(result, v)
    end
    result
  end
end

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)

mut nums: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut has = false
mut neg = false

while i < n
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if has
        let v = if neg
          -cur
        else
          cur
        end
        nums = insert_sorted(nums, v)
        cur = 0
        has = false
        neg = false
      end
    else if b == 45
      neg = true
      has = true
    else
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if has
  let v = if neg
    -cur
  else
    cur
  end
  nums = insert_sorted(nums, v)
end

mut out = ""
mut j = 0
let m = nums.len()
while j < m
  match nums.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    if j == 0
      out = "#{x}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{x}"
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
  j = j + 1
end

println(out)
